---
name: RFC — Request for Comments
about: Propose a non-trivial change that affects multiple subsystems
title: "[rfc] "
labels: rfc, needs-discussion
---

## Summary

One-paragraph summary of the proposal.

## Motivation

Why now? What's the gap? What problem does this solve?

## Detailed design

- Affected modules / files
- New APIs / contracts
- Backwards compatibility story
- Roll-out plan (feature flag? staged?)

## Alternatives

What other shapes did you consider?

## Open questions

What needs more discussion before implementation?

## Success criteria

How will we know this worked? (metrics, observable signals, user feedback)

## Timeline

- Draft PR target:
- Review period:
- Merge target:

---

> **Tip**: For small changes (single-file bug fix, doc typo, test addition)
> open a regular PR instead of an RFC. RFCs are for changes that touch
> ≥ 2 subsystems or change public contracts.
